headline: Your Command Center for the Entire Heady Ecosystem.
subheadline: HeadyWeb is the unified micro-frontend portal that composes seven federated AI apps into a single, seamless workspace. One login, one interface, infinite leverage — for operators, builders, and businesses running on Heady.
body: Built with Webpack 5 Module Federation, HeadyWeb loads only the apps you need — each federated app is independently deployed, versioned, and upgradeable without portal downtime. Drag-and-drop your workspace layout, white-label for your brand, and collaborate in real time with your team.
